resolver.determinism: visited-set prevents cycles; one resolved value per L0 per frame; correctives one-way applied last
resolver.smoothing: critically-damped tau per param; physicsInput params bypass (tau=0)

watch counter-rotate (owned, driven by forearm twist)
body turn -> twist cascade (single twist owner)
keep head level vs body turn (corrective, last)
